title: Contract Metadata
description: Human-readable context for smart contracts. Enriches ABI data with titles, descriptions, semantic type annotations, and presentation hints.

$schema.description: URI pointing to the JSON Schema that this document conforms to.

chainId.description: The chain ID of the network where the contract is deployed.

address.description: The contract address (lowercase, without checksum). Use this for a specific deployed contract.

includes.description: Interface identifiers to include (e.g. "interface:erc20", "interface:erc721"). Included metadata is merged with contract-specific metadata taking priority.

meta.description: Document-level housekeeping: revision tracking, locale, and authenticity.

image.description: Contract image or logo URI (ERC-7572: image).

external_link.description: Primary external URL for the project (ERC-7572: external_link).

collaborators.description: Ethereum addresses of authorized metadata editors (ERC-7572: collaborators).

about.description: Long-form context, history, and explanations in Markdown format.

category.description: Primary category. Standard values: token, nft, defi, governance, bridge, oracle, utility, game, social, identity. Custom values are allowed.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and categorization.

links.description: External links (website, documentation, block explorer, etc.).

risks.description: Known risks or caveats users should be aware of.

theme.description: Visual theme for UI rendering. Color model inspired by ENSIP-18.

groups.description: Named groups for organizing functions in the UI. Keys are group identifiers referenced by functions.

actions.description: User-facing actions, keyed by free-form identifier (e.g. "approve", "revoke", "my-balance"). Each action references an ABI function via its `function` field and may preset or lock parameters. Multiple actions may target the same function to provide UX variants.

events.description: Per-event metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 32-byte topic hash for unverified contracts (e.g. "0xddf252ad1be2c89b69c2b068fc378daa952ba7f163c4a11628f55a4df523b3ef").

errors.description: Per-error metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 4-byte selector for unverified contracts (e.g. "0x08c379a0").

messages.description: EIP-712 typed message metadata, keyed by primary type name (e.g. "Permit", "Order"). Describes off-chain signing flows verified by this contract.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

version.description: Metadata revision number. Increment when updating metadata for the same contract.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

signature.description: Optional signature for verifying metadata authenticity.

Theme.description: Visual theme colors for UI rendering. Inspired by ENSIP-18. Accent and text colors should maintain a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the background.

background.description: Background color as a hex string.

accentText.description: Text color used on accent backgrounds.

description.description: Optional description of what this group contains.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

function.description: Reference to the ABI function this action invokes. Accepts a bare name (e.g. "approve"), a full Solidity signature (e.g. "approve(address,uint256)") for overloaded functions, or a 4-byte selector (e.g. "0x095ea7b3") for unverified contracts. OPTIONAL: when omitted, the action's id (its key in the `actions` object) is used as the reference — so `"approve": { ... }` is equivalent to `"approve": { "function": "approve", ... }`. Variant actions whose id differs from the underlying function (e.g. `"revoke": { "function": "approve", ... }`) MUST set this field explicitly.

order.description: Display order within the action's group (lower numbers appear first). Actions without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

description.description: What the action does, explained for end users.

intent.description: Template string rendered with formatted parameter values. Use {paramName} placeholders (e.g. "Transfer {wad} to {dst}"). Prefix with # to prepend a hash symbol (e.g. "Buy Punk #{punkIndex}" renders as "Buy Punk #7804"). Values are formatted using their type before insertion.

group.description: Group key (must match a key in the top-level groups object).

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before interaction.

featured.description: Mark as a primary/featured action. Featured actions are highlighted in the UI (e.g. the main mint, swap, or stake action).

hidden.description: Hide this action from the default UI. Use for internal or admin-only actions that clutter the interface, or to suppress the ABI-synthesized default when only variants should render.

stateMutability.description: Overrides the ABI's stateMutability. Use only to correct legacy ABIs that lack this field (e.g. pre-Byzantium contracts).

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name. Use _0, _1, etc. for unnamed parameters.

returns.description: Return value metadata, keyed by ABI return name or _0, _1, etc.

related.description: Action identifiers (keys in the top-level actions object) of related actions for navigation.

deprecated.description: Deprecation notice. If set, the action should be de-emphasized in the UI.

MessageMeta.description: Metadata for an EIP-712 typed message verified by this contract.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Messages without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

title.description: Human-readable name for this message type.

description.description: What signing this message does, explained for end users.

intent.description: Template string rendered with formatted field values. Use {fieldName} placeholders (e.g. "Permit {spender} to spend {value}").

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before signing.

fields.description: Field metadata, keyed by EIP-712 field name.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Events without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Errors without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

description.description: What this error means and when it occurs.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

type.description: Semantic type annotation. Tells consumers what a value represents (for display) and how it should be collected (for input). Note: `type: "hidden"` is a display-side hint (don't render the value in read contexts) and is orthogonal to the input-side `hidden` flag below.

autofill.description: Pre-populate this input with a value from the specified source.

hidden.description: When true, do not render an input for this parameter. The `autofill` value is injected at call time. REQUIRES `autofill`. Use for variant actions like `revoke` where a parameter is fixed (e.g. amount = 0).

disabled.description: When true, render the input but make it non-editable. Displays the autofilled value for transparency. REQUIRES `autofill`. Mutually exclusive with `hidden: true`.

oneOf.description: Semantic type. Tells consumers what a value represents and how to render it in both read and write contexts.

ens.description: Enable ENS name resolution. Default: true.

addressBook.description: Show address book picker. Default: false.

oneOf.description: Token amount for a specific ERC-20, ERC-721, or ERC-1155. Display: format with decimals and symbol. Input: show balance and max button.
Token ID for a specific ERC-721 or ERC-1155.

values.description: Mapping of raw values to human-readable labels.

oneOf.description: Enumerated values with labels. Display: show label. Input: render as select dropdown.

min.description: Minimum value (string to support uint256 range).

max.description: Maximum value (string to support uint256 range).

step.description: Step increment (string to support uint256 range).

oneOf.description: Ranged numeric value. Input: render as slider.

Type.description: Semantic type annotation. Tells consumers what a value represents and how to render it for both display and input.

oneOf.description: Pre-populate with a literal constant value.

Autofill.description: Value source for pre-populating an input field.

min.description: Minimum value (as string to support uint256 range).

max.description: Maximum value (as string to support uint256 range).

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern the value must match.

ParamPreview.description: Visual preview shown as the user fills in a parameter value.

image.description: URI template that resolves to an image for the current parameter value. Supports CAIP-19/CAIP-29, IPFS, and HTTPS URIs. Use {paramName} for interpolation.

params.description: Parameter values for the example, keyed by parameter name.
